heading: General. An automatic sprinkler system shall be installed in the occupancies and locations as set forth in this section.
verbatim:
(24)	The first sentence of Section 903.2 is repealed and reenacted to read:
Approved automatic sprinkler system in new buildings and structures shall be provided in the locations described in Sections 903.2.1 through 903.2.15.
(25)	Section 903.2.1 is amended by the addition of the following:

heading: Vent Terminal Required. Open vent pipes that extend through a roof shall be terminated not less than 6 inches above the roof.
verbatim:
(p)	The Exception to Section 1003.4 is repealed and reenacted to read:
Exception: For elevators without firefighter's emergency operation, an oil separator is not required for drainage from hydraulic elevator pits where an approved oil sensing system is installed.
(q)	Section 1101.3, "Prohibited drainage," is repealed and reenacted to read:
